failure_reason: Added first-class BML choiceReceipt source rows for channel/protocol routing metadata, lowered them into CHOICE-RECEIPT cells and branch-choice learning, and updated the floor/north star after validation. Local three-kernel proofs pass; fourth-arm gap is explicit for the new row with fkwu=44039 vs Go=131071. The existing BML/Hati native method-call slice also remains proven and the native binary probe reports expected stdout with empty stderr for INT/FLOAT/CHAR/ADD/CHOOSE/LOCALS/METHODCALL.
